verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's amazing how he loved me and he chose to die I live, He Gave up all His life at Calvary, He did not complain or say Hit back But He choose to die He choose to die that I may live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Am glad I've found the one The one who love me first The one who choose to die that I may live It was love amazing love That forever keep me on Am grateful Jesus Christ for your Amazing love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He loves me when am weak He loves me when am poor He such a faithful friend and ever true It's this love that keeps me on And forever drives me on And this love, One day shall take me home
